name: Chicken in Wine and Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts (boned and cut into halves)
Instant wine and cream sauce ingredients:
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in a delicate instant wine and cream sauce.
Note: The wine sauce can be prepared in advance and reheated at serving time.
You may substitute 2 small fryer chickens (about 2 ½ lbs), cut into pieces, for the chicken breasts.
You may substitute ¼ cup green onions for the shallots.
2. Dust the chicken lightly with flour and baste with 4 tablespoons melted butter.
3. Sprinkle with salt, white pepper, and garlic powder.
4. Place the chicken in a 9x13-inch roasting pan and bake in a 325°F oven for about 15-20 minutes, or until just cooked through. Do not overcook.
5. Meanwhile, sauté shallots and garlic in butter until the shallots are soft but not browned.
6. Add wine and broth and cook over medium-high heat until the liquid is reduced to about half.
7. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer the sauce until slightly thickened, about 3 minutes.
8. Place the warm chicken on a lovely platter and spoon the sauce over all.
Serves 4
